description_long: This is a humanoid male figure with pointed elf-like ears, dressed in a shiny, fitted leather jacket and matching leather pants. The figure's arms are extended horizontally in a T-pose, and he wears a belt with a visible buckle and casual lace-up sneakers. His facial features are youthful, with a clean-shaven face and short, straight hair that covers the ears partially from the side. The leather outfit is detailed with seams, zippers, and realistic folds, giving a modern, urban appearance. The figure's posture and attire suggest he could be a character in a contemporary city environment, possibly with a fantasy twist due to the ears. No accessories or carried objects are visible.
description: A young male figure with pointed ears, wearing a shiny leather jacket and pants, and casual sneakers, posed with arms outstretched. The outfit is detailed and urban, with a fantasy element from the ears.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face, pointed ears, leather jacket with zipper details, belt, and sneakers.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, ear shape, and the fit of the leather outfit.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the back of the head, pointed ears, jacket seams, and the rear of the pants and sneakers.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side profile, hairstyle, and the contour of the leather clothing.
attribute_clothing_type: fitted leather jacket and leather pants with a belt, casual style
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
attribute_hairstyle: short straight hair with side part
